title: Mouse Pancreatic Islet Isolation
author: Nancy Smith
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sqaedse
materials: After isolation, allow digestion to proceed for 7 minutes (lot specific -Sigma C9263 lot 010M8620 ) in shaking water bath at 37°C. 00:07:00 37 °C

steps.title: Measure out 900ml of room temperature H 2 O
steps.instruction: Measure out 900ml of room temperature H 2 O.

steps.title: While gently stirring the water, add the powdered medium
steps.instruction: While gently stirring the water, add the powdered medium. Stir until dissolved. DO NOT HEAT.

steps.title: Rinse original vial with water to...
steps.instruction: Rinse original vial with water to remove traces and add to above.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.35g sodium bicarbonate and stir until dissolved. undetermined, Sodium Bicarbonate

steps.title: Dissolve 1mg/ml Collagenase in HBSS from above
steps.instruction: Dissolve 1mg/ml Collagenase in HBSS from above. Approximately 5ml per mouse for injection and shaking Make fresh before isolation, and keep on ice (use within the hour)

steps.title: Add Mouse Islet Media to stop digestion
steps.instruction: Add Mouse Islet Media to stop digestion. Tubes remain on ice until ready for purification.

steps.title: Allow islets to settle (2-3 minutes) and remove excess fat
steps.instruction: Allow islets to settle (2-3 minutes) and remove excess fat. Proceed to the histopaque gradient protocol to purify the islets. If hand picking is preferred, go to the next step. https://www.protocols.io/view/purification-of-mouse-pancreatic-islets-using-hist-u7ueznw

steps.title: Pour islets into a non tissue...
steps.instruction: Pour islets into a non tissue culture dish and pick islets into a 35mm non tissue culture dish.

steps.title: Once islets picked cleanly, culture using...
steps.instruction: Once islets picked cleanly, culture using Mouse Islet Media in 37°C, 5% CO 2 until ready for use in experiment.

steps.title: Euthanize mouse according to your institute's research ethics protocols
steps.instruction: Euthanize mouse according to your institute's research ethics protocols. (We use a CO 2 chamber)

steps.title: Common bile duct is tied or...
steps.instruction: Common bile duct is tied or clamped where it meets the intestine.

steps.title: Collagenase is injected in situ via...
steps.instruction: Collagenase is injected in situ via the common bile duct using a size 30G needle until the pancreas is inflated (typically 1-2 mL). The head and the tail of the pancreas should be inflated to maximize the number of islets isolated.

steps.title: The pancreas is removed and placed...
steps.instruction: The pancreas is removed and placed in tube (15mL or 50mL depends on preference) with remaining collagenase (1-2mL) and kept on ice until the next step.

steps.title: Make a midline incision from the...
steps.instruction: Make a midline incision from the lower abdomen to the sternum.

steps.title: Add FBS and Pen/Strep to bottle of RPMI %s %s
steps.instruction: Add FBS and Pen/Strep to bottle of RPMI %s %s
